query:
DELETE FROM performers WHERE name IN (
  'Ryan Connor',
  'Test Performer 1768675105260',
  'Minimal Performer 1768675105393',
  'Test Performer 1',
  'Test Performer 2',
  'Mia Stellar',
  'Ruby Passion',
  'Ivy Valentine',
  'Diamond Luxe',
  'Raven Night',
  'Crystal Waters',
  'Amber Blaze',
  'Jade Phoenix',
  'Scarlett Vixen',
  'Luna Rose'
) OR (name = 'Angela White' AND id < (SELECT MAX(id) FROM (SELECT id FROM performers WHERE name = 'Angela White') AS temp));
